APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/30/23 IS CONTINUED TO 8/21/23 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRE-TRIAL AND DISCOVERY DEADLINES SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ALL FURTHER CONTINUANCES OF THE TRIAL DATE MUST BE BY NOTICED MOTION. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR AT TRIAL. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL IS WAIVED BY PARTIES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT CONFORMS TO THE COURT'S RULING AND SHOULD BE APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
